data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for idempotent handling of duplicate replies, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for idempotent handling of duplicate replies, yet there is no supporting evidence demonstrating how the system implements this requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the idempotent handling of duplicate replies.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
